title: armeria maritima subsp. alpina
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. alpina, also known as dwarf sea thrift, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the tea rose family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Armeria maritima subsp. alpina include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress, and promote relaxation, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Armeria maritima subsp. alpina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
